liked these roads coming up a mini tour of Lombardi Sereno to Bergamo and in and around the hills next to Lake Como and into the chitade mile Bergamo an important city in the history of Italy had its reunification 160 odd years ago hildo and big climbs Bergamot passed a couple of times up the famous roncosa after passing the salvino as well back into town up above the Old Town the final climb and the Deep descent straight back into the center after 195 kilometers It's the final stage of the second week of the journal Italia the GC the mayarosa in play and you can watch it all every pedal
